source_description: In a hospital waiting area with seating and plants, Monica stands holding a payphone receiver to her ear, gesturing with her free hand. She says, "No, mom, everything's going fine."
Chandler walks in from the left, wearing a blue hoodie. Monica continues, "Really. Yeah, Ross is great."
Chandler walks in from the left, wearing a blue hoodie. Monica continues, "Really. Yeah, Ross is great."
Chandler stops near Monica, raising his arms slightly as he looks at her. Monica gestures animatedly, pointing her finger away, and says, "He's a he's in a whole other place. No, he's gone."
Chandler stops near Monica, raising his arms slightly as he looks at her. Monica gestures animatedly, pointing her finger away, and says, "He's a he's in a whole other place. No, he's gone."
Chandler stops near Monica, raising his arms slightly as he looks at her. Monica gestures animatedly, pointing her finger away, and says, "He's a he's in a whole other place. No, he's gone."
Monica briefly presses a hand to her face as Chandler watches her.
Lowering her hand, Monica says into the phone, "No, no, you you don't have to fly back. Really."
Chandler stands with his hands in his pockets, listening to her side of the call.
Monica gestures in front of her with an open palm and asks, "What do you mean? This might be your only chance."
Monica pauses her gesturing and listens.

A woman carrying a baby walks past them. Monica looks at the woman, gasps, and says, "I'm only 26. I'm I'm not even thinking about babies yet," her voice trembling and visible tears forming on her face. Chandler looks at her.
